title: Inverted VO2max Ladder
description: Hardest effort first, then sustain quality as intensity drops
purpose: Hardest first, sustain quality on fatigue

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 21:27 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 21:27 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/7. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/7. Target: 120% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 7 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 2 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 2:36 at 120-120%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/7. 2:36 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:36. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/7. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/7. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 41% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 115% for 4:33. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 2min at 55%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 41% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 41% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. 115% for 4:33. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/7. 2:36 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/7. 55-55% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-100 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/7. 2:36 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 2:36. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 53% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 53% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 53% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. 110% for 5:51. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/7. 62% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6. 18min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6/7. 39 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 62% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 7:09 at 105%. Then 14min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 7:09 at 105%. Then 14min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 14min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 105% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 77% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 77% complete. Rep 1/1. 50% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 49 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
